name: Operator-on-F complements value-equivalence: a planning-time diagnostic for latent world models
summary: arXiv:2607.04464v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: World-model evaluation for model-based reinforcement learning typically asks whether the learned model predicts reward and value well, whic...
description: arXiv:2607.04464v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: World-model evaluation for model-based reinforcement learning typically asks whether the learned model predicts reward and value well, which can leave planning-relevant errors in the model's latent rollouts unmeasured. We introduce a complementary diagnostic, operator-on-F, that compares a model's k-step latent pushforward to the environ...
author: Donna Vakalis
